Ball of Everliving Golem  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
HP: +15
SV FIRE: +2 SV DISEASE: +2 SV COLD: +2 SV MAGIC: +2 SV POISON: +2
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Slot: RANGE
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Page Updated:Tue May 2nd, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50

MQ on Povar
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2013 at 12:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1600647558344
1 post
Common my rear end, in all the kills of these golems just in the past week I have seen 3 Soul Leech, Dark Sword of Blood (Very Rare), 2 Shield of Rainbow Hues (Ultra Rare), 1 Monsoon, Sword of the Swiftwind (Common), 4 Lyssa`s Darkwood Piccolo (Very Rare), 1 DawnFire, Morning Star of Light (Rare), 3 Darkwood Trunk (Uncommon), 1 Bone-Clasped Girdle (Rare), 2 Blood Fire (Rare), 1 Amulet of Necropotence (Rare).
The Ball of Everliving Golem is the final piece I need to finish up my warrior`s 1.0 and in 2 months of camping I have not seen this item. Looking to buy MQ on Povar if someone has one in their bank. Please contact Walador, Wancaldor, Jhester, Kallisto, Kolyda, or Yawenky in game with price
▲ Page top
MQ on Povar
QuoteReply

Scholar
18 posts
